tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"nft add table inet dns_guard; nft 'add chain inet dns_guard output { type filter hook output priority 0; policy accept; }'; nft add rule inet dns_guard output ip daddr 192.168.1.1 udp dport 53 accept; nft add rule inet dns_guard output ip daddr 192.168.1.1 tcp dport 53 accept; nft add rule inet dns_guard output udp dport 53 drop; nft add rule inet dns_guard output tcp dport 53 drop; nft add rule inet dns_guard output ip daddr 192.168.1.1 udp dport 8853 accept; nft add rule inet dns_guard output ip daddr 192.168.1.1 tcp dport 8853 accept; nft add rule inet dns_guard output udp dport 8853 drop; nft add rule inet dns_guard output tcp dport 8853 drop; nft list ruleset"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"dig @192.168.1.1 test.example.com +time=1 +tries=1; echo DIG_LOCAL:$?; dig @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 test.example.com +time=1 +tries=1; echo DIG_EXT:$?; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1; echo WGET:$?; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2; echo PING:$?"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
dig @192.168.1.1 test.example.com +time=1 +triees=1; echo DIG_LOCAL:$?; dig @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 test.example.com +time=1 +triess=1; echo DIG_EXT:$?; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1; echo WGGET:$?; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2; echo PING:$?
;; communications error to 192.168.1.1#53: timed out

; <<>> DiG 9.18.39-0ubuntu0.24.04.3-Ubuntu <<>> @192.168.1.1 test.example.com +time=1 +tries=1
; (1 server found)
;; global options: +cmd
;; no servers could be reached
DIG_LOCAL:9
;; communications error to 203.0.113.1#8853: timed out

; <<>> DiG 9.18.39-0ubuntu0.24.04.3-Ubuntu <<>> @203.0.113.1 -p 8853 test.example.com +time=1 +tries=1
; (1 server found)
;; global options: +cmd
;; no servers could be reached
DIG_EXT:9
WGET:4
PING 192.168.1.2 (192.168.1.2) 56(84) bytes of data.
64 bytes from 192.168.1.2: icmp_seq=1 ttl=64 time=5.85 ms

--- 192.168.1.2 ping statistics ---
1 packets transmitted, 1 received, 0% packet loss, time 0ms
rtt min/avg/max/mdev = 5.852/5.852/5.852/0.000 ms
PING:0
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"nft delete table inet dns_guard; nft add table inet dns_guard; nft 'add chain inet dns_guard output { type filter hook output priority 0; policy accept; }'; nft add rule inet dns_guard output oifname \"eth0\" ip daddr 192.168.1.1 udp dport 53 accept; nft add rule inet dns_guard output oifname \"eth0\" ip daddr 192.168.1.1 tcp dport 53 accept; nft add rule inet dns_guard output oifname \"eth1\" udp dport 53 drop; nft add rule inet dns_guard output oifname \"eth1\" tcp dport 53 drop; nft add rule inet dns_guard output oifname \"eth1\" udp dport 8853 drop; nft add rule inet dns_guard output oifname \"eth1\" tcp dport 8853 drop; nft list ruleset"}
